name: Whole Wheat Soft Pretzels- Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the first 5 ingredients to the bread pan. Mix in molasses and water. Place dry yeast into the yeast holder. Select: WHOLE WHEAT DOUGH MODE. Press start. The Breadmaker will complete the basic dough mode in 3 hours and 15 minutes.
2. Divide the dough into 8 equal portions. Roll each portion on a lightly floured surface into a ball. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 20 minutes.
3. Using the palm of your hand, roll each unit on a lightly floured surface into a rope about 10 inches long.
4. Twist once where the dough overlaps.
5. Lift the ends across to opposite edges. Tuck the ends under.
6. Place on a greased baking pan. Spray water on top. Proof at 90°F for 30 to 50 minutes.
7. Brush with beaten egg. Add desired toppings.
8. Bake in a 375°F oven for 15 to 22 minutes.
